nodes.title: Negative Prompt
widgets_values: blurry, oversaturated, pixelated, low resolution, grainy, distorted, noise, artifacts, glitches, watermark, text, logo, signature, copyright, subtitles, distorted sound, saturated sound, loud, woman with teeth smile

nodes.title: Positive Prompt
widgets_values:
The woman keeps same posture and calm face expression the whole scene while drinking from the straw. The wind is naturally blowing her hair the whole scene.
The boat should be moving slowly.
